arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hails Arsenal 'difference-maker' and sends new Champions League message
arts.sum: Arsenal booked their first Champions League semi-final place since 2009 with a 2-1 win in the Santiago Bernabeu to complete a two-legged demolition of the reigning champions Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Benjamin Sesko transfer blow as asking price revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal have learnt how much they will have to spend to complete a deal for RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko this summer. Sesko was keen to resolve his future before Euro 2024, but the Gunners were unable to commit to a deal as Eddie Nketiah was still at the club.

arts.ttl: Thursday’s briefing: Arsenal outclass Real Madrid as Amorim makes Onana decision
arts.sum: Manchester United, Tottenham, Rangers and Chelsea are all in action on Thursday in European quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Joe Cole picks out Champions League star as transfer option for Arsenal and Chelsea
arts.sum: Joe Cole has hailed Borussia Dortmund's transfer business as Serhou Guirassy, who was only signed in the summer, continued to produce in their Champions League campaign as he tipped Arsenal to consider a move

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: William Saliba sent Real Madrid message as UEFA issue statement
arts.sum: Arsenal still have to play out the final few months of the 2024/25 season but plans already appear to be in place for next campaign and specifically the summer transfer window

arts.ttl: How flamboyant Eintracht Frankfurt star Hugo Ekitike recovered from 'mental weakness' to become one of Europe's hottest young strikers - and how much he could really cost Arsenal and Liverpool this summer, writes JAMES SHARPE
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: It took Hugo Ekitike just six minutes to show the rest of Europe why he's one of the most wanted young strikers on the continent.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti's future uncertain after Real Madrid's Champions League quarterfinal exit
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti says he isn’t certain about his coaching future following Real Madrid’s quarterfinal loss to Arsenal in the Champions League. Yet he was asked if Wednesday’s 2-1 loss at the Santiago Bernabeu stadium — which meant Arsenal advanced 5-1 on aggregate — would be his last Champions League game with the Spanish powerhouse.

arts.ttl: Lucas Vázquez: "The Madridistas know we always give it our all"
arts.sum: Lucas Vázquez spoke to the press at the end of the Champions League match against Arsenal: “It's a difficult moment, we tried. The team tried their best overall.”

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: "We have to hold our heads high, we must learn from it and fight in the next game"
arts.sum: Now there are three competitions left and we have to be focused on LaLiga, the Copa ( del Rey ) final and the Club World Cup .” The coach analysed the game: “It's a disappointment to go out of the Champions League, it's normal to think so.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hails 'one of the best nights of my career' after Arsenal topple Real Madrid - and jokes he 'wanted to SLAP' Bukayo Saka after Panenka penalty miss
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE BERNABEU: Arteta lauded a landmark night for Arsenal as they dethroned the kings of Europe to reach the Champions League semi-finals for the first time since 2009.
